use_cases: AI chat and message input fields with animated visual feedback
Generative AI command and prompt entry interfaces
Creative tool input areas with dynamic color effects
Voice/text hybrid AI assistant input panels
Modern SaaS dashboard AI query inputs
ai_summary: A visually striking AI input component featuring an animated color orb with spinning gradients and customizable tones. The component uses motion animations for smooth transitions and supports responsive sizing. Designed for AI-powered interfaces, it combines glass-morphism aesthetics with vibrant gradients to create engaging input experiences for SaaS and creative tool applications.
